# About Me

<!-- This is a comment. Below, you'll see code for inserting an image. To make this image appear, update <custom-path>. To add an image, save it inside the imgs folder of this repository. -->
<img src="<custom-path>/static/imgs/logo.png" alt="Image of Comp110 rainbow logo. "  width="500"/>

My name is Peter Garofolo. I am a Sophomore at UNC Chapel Hill double majoring in Biology and Health Policy and Management. I have a little over a year of coding experience in Java and Python. Although coding might not be my best skill, I really enjoy learning about it. This is my second GitHub repository, and I hope you enjoy it!
